title: cytisus hirsutus subsp. bisflorens
intro: Cytisus hirsutus subsp. bisflorens, also known as hairy broom or broom, is a flowering plant species within the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cytisus hirsutus subsp. bisflorens include its potential to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
